note: NEP-0004 law 2 · inputs.p is untrusted (caller-suppliable) and resolvable via its default · the canonical form of ../../etc/passwd escapes fs.read [datasets/**] · re-gate refused at check · the detail carries the taint path source-first (inputs.p -> args.path) · the tool grant isolates the re-gate (the verb IS permitted, the value is not).
